---
title: "\'A Letter from Philadelphia\'"
---

## \'A Letter from Philadelphia\'
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (June 1865) 671-683

### Notes

Dated April 1865, it describes the rejoicing in Philadelphia at the end of the American Civil War and the mourning after the assassination of Abraham Lincoln.

It may well be the work of CMY\'s correspondent in Philadelphia, Miss Lewis.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
